experience.description: As a security advisor I was responsible for driving to a preset installation appointment and educating the customer on our products.  Once I went through a detailed description and demonstration of all the home protection products I then would go into my sales pitch to sell the proper sensors for the customers house.  Installation of all the products was fun and getting to know the customer and give them the best possible coverage for their money was my goal daily
experience.title: Sales Specialist

experience.description: Jimmy John's: I was hired on to become a general manager at Jimmy John's but shortly after my training process started, ownership saw my enthusiasm for the job and ability to learn fast and asked me to take on the role of Area Manager for their organization. As the Area Manager I oversaw the operations of 4 franchised locations, comprised of over 100 employees with locations in the Kalamazoo & Portage markets 7 days a week. While with the organization I also helped recruit and train staff…                                Show more                    Jimmy John's: I was hired on to become a general manager at Jimmy John's but shortly after my training process started, ownership saw my enthusiasm for the job and ability to learn fast and asked me to take on the role of Area Manager for their organization. As the Area Manager I oversaw the operations of 4 franchised locations, comprised of over 100 employees with locations in the Kalamazoo & Portage markets 7 days a week. While with the organization I also helped recruit and train staff for a 5th location that recently opened. Daily responsibilities included making trips to all 4 of my stores, auditing cleanliness, performing weekly on hand inventory audits to maintain COGS below 26% across all franchised locations. My favorite part of the job was working with all the staff at different stores and making myself available to help where most needed if one operation needed help to execute large catering orders. Customer service and being "Freaky Fast" and making sandwiches in 30 seconds or less was our driving force to success.                                 Show less
experience.title: Area Manager
